name: auth-service-express
description: 1. dont runn tests locally.. run tests directly in CI pipeline.

scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from backend
scripts.docker:testnocache: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from backend
